description: A customer sold their car and wants to cancel their auto insurance policy.

nodes.task_description: Identify the policyholder and verify their request to cancel.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly identifies the customer and confirms their intent.

nodes.task_description: Calculate and explain any prorated refund the customer will receive.

expected_outcome.value: Agent calculates the refund amount and clearly explains when and how the customer will receive it.
